name: SMS Consent Collection
author: Zhi
description: Stand-in mockup for the SMS consent collection v0 spec. Shows Subscribers nav inserted into AI Journey with three tabs: sign-up forms, subscriber list, audit log. Demonstrates AI-generated TCPA/CASL disclosure with edit-and-version-track flow.

name: Aspire Nutrition RCS Demo
author: Zhi
description: Interactive RCS messaging prototype with Rich Cards, Carousels, Video Cards, and Maps. Three scenarios: Cart Abandonment, Post-Purchase, New Product Launch.

name: Brand Tone of Voice
author: Zhi
description: Mockup exploring how brand tone of voice can be configured and previewed.

name: RCS Templates Visual Guide
author: Zhi
description: Visual guide showcasing RCS template patterns and components.
